title: Savory Spicy Saudi Arabian Pork Kebabs
description: A funky and molten Saudi Arabian dish featuring minced pork, perfect for a date night, with a blend of spices and a dash of excitement, however please note that in Saudi Arabia pork is not commonly consumed due to dietary restrictions, this recipe is an adaptation for those who do consume pork.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, combine the minced pork, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Mix everything together with your hands or a wooden spoon until just combined.
Thread the pork mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through.
While the kebabs are cooking, heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat and cook the dates until they are caramelized.
Serve the kebabs hot with the caramelized dates on top.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
